creator: tonymaher@optusnet.com.au
text:
On 05/05/12 22:40, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of astro/wcslib,
>
> Please note that PR ports/167611 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/167611
>

Looks ok but I prefer original Makefile tab spacing to remain.
Attached patch should be same aas submitter except for spacing.

thanks
--
